title: A Gift of Dhamma
author: Ajahn Chah
summary: A public talk given on October 10, 1977, addressed to the parents of a monk who had come from France to visit their son. An edited version of this talk has been translated into English under the same name. This is a translation of a new, full transcript of the original talk.
